flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Porterville College rose 48% between 2007 and 2010 ($514 → $762).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Porterville College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Porterville College rose 63% between 2009 and 2010 (3.1% → 5.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Porterville College rose 62% between 2007 and 2010 (2.3k → 3.7k).
